title: Blue Ancient Debris
description: This resource pack replaces Ancient Debris with a blue-themed variant designed to improve visibility in the Nether while keeping a vanilla-friendly style.
body:
This resource pack replaces the default Ancient Debris texture with a blue-themed variant designed to improve visibility in the Nether while keeping a vanilla-friendly style. The recolor helps the block stand out more clearly from surrounding terrain, making Netherite mining easier without changing gameplay.

![BlueDebris01](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/15627d59385a3dbbe970ec0e0670cd3b5a88a7d4.png)
